description.value:
Frequency once per hour

You make the sign of Lao Shu Po's eye and curse a creature with inescapable visions from the Netherworld. Choose a creature you can see within 30 feet. The target must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 2 rounds.

Critical Failure The target is stupefied 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1} for 1 minute.
